name: Edsion Douyin Video Text Extraction
tagline: Extract text and download watermark-free videos from Douyin share links
description: Self-contained skill that processes Douyin (TikTok China) share links. Extracts speech-to-text transcriptions using Alibaba Cloud Bailian ASR, downloads watermark-free videos, and parses video metadata. Ships standalone Python scripts — no external server needed. Text extraction requires a DASHSCOPE_API_KEY; downloading and parsing are free.
